/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc -fPIC  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g -O0  -shared -Wl,-soname,libplugin-monitor.so -o ../libplugin-monitor.so CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor_config.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/mqtt_handle.c.o   -L/home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/workspace/build-linux ../../libneuron-base.so -lnng -lpthread /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libssl.a /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lpthread -lm -lprotobuf-c -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
